channel.title: Websockets on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Websockets on Arrans github.io

item.title: joewalnes/websocketd
item.description: Turn any program that uses STDIN/STDOUT into a WebSocket server. Like inetd, but for WebSockets.

item.title: thehowl/claws
item.description: Awesome WebSocket CLient - an interactive command line client for testing websocket servers
